Complete documentation of how we fixed the EM-Skill discovery issue.

- Claude couldn't find 'em-team' when asked from other repos
- First attempt using ~/.claude/config.json failed

- Each skill needs its own directory with SKILL.md file

⚠️ CRITICAL: Do NOT use /em or /em- prefix

- Reload shell first: exec zsh
